Describe the sequence of actions the man performs while working on the bicycle tire and tube throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a man uses two screwdrivers to pry a black bicycle tire away from the rim; at 10s, he sits holding the wheel and a black rubber inner tube; at 12s, a hand displays a small silver metal valve core close-up; at 16s, the man uses his fingers to adjust the tire bead near the rim while wearing a light blue wristband.

What tool does the man use to lift the tire bead after the initial attempt?
canonical_answer: He uses a yellow and black handled tire lever tool.
